2026-0556
2026-06-04AAFC, JUSCriminal CodeOrder Amending the Pari-Mutuel Payments OrderOrder Amending the Pari-Mutuel Payments Order in order to increase the amount of money received by the Canadian Pari-Mutuel Agency to support the delivery of programs and services that advance the federal mandate of protecting Canadians when betting on horse racing.N/A
subject: Order Amending the Pari-Mutuel Payments Order
precis: Order Amending the Pari-Mutuel Payments Order in order to increase the amount of money received by the Canadian Pari-Mutuel Agency to support the delivery of programs and services that advance the federal mandate of protecting Canadians when betting on horse racing.
